subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet from which the breezes of forgiveness waft over the peoples of all existence, and mercy descendeth upon those who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح منه تهب نسایم الغفران علی اهل الاکوان و تنزل الرحمه علی الذینهم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @power of the Manifestation of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @high station of the true believer
